negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_108
prompt: A medium shot of a CLAAS combine harvester in action within a vast wheat field under an overcast sky. The harvester, painted in grey and green with red wheels, is prominently featured in the foreground, with its front-mounted C540 cutting mechanism clearly visible. The operator is seated inside the cab, partially visible through the windshield, and appears focused on the task. The wheat field stretches out into the distance, with rolling hills faintly visible on the horizon. The harvester moves steadily forward, cutting through the golden wheat. The scene captures the rhythmic motion of the harvester as it harvests the crop, emphasizing the scale and efficiency of modern farming techniques.
